cases.description: Existence probe: pivot rows a/b vs columns x/y summing 1..4. In Excel 365 this spills a small pivot table (row+column headers and totals by default); exact layout depends on optional args, so we only assert the engine recognizes the function (not #NAME?)
cases.expected_note: Probe only: spilled pivot layout (headers/totals) varies with optional args; the key datum is whether the engine has PIVOTBY at all
